emails.subject: RE: California Litigation Team
emails.body: RE: California Litigation Team Mark, query whether Bill Urquhart of Quinn Emanuel should be included. Jim

emails.subject: RE: California Litigation Team
emails.body: Jim: Good question. With all that is going on the answer is yes I think. Mark James Derrick/ENRON@enronXgate 04/12/2001 06:05 PM
